ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disasters" (
  "disaster_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the disaster declaration */,
  "fema_declaration_string" TEXT /* FEMA declaration string associated with the disaster */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the disaster occurred */,
  "declaration_type" TEXT /* Type of declaration (e.g., DR for Major Disaster) */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date when the disaster was declared */,
  "fy_declared" INTEGER /* Fiscal year when the disaster was declared */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., Hurricane, Flood) */,
  "declaration_title" TEXT /* Title of the disaster declaration */,
  "disaster_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disaster */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Estimated number of people affected */,
  "estimated_damage_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the damage */,
  "response_agency" TEXT /* Primary agency responsible for the response */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the incident location */,
  "disaster_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the disaster (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "assistance_programs" (
  "disaster_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster declaration */,
  "ih_program_declared" INTEGER /* Indicator if Individual Housing program was declared */,
  "ia_program_declared" INTEGER /* Indicator if Individual Assistance program was declared */,
  "pa_program_declared" INTEGER /* Indicator if Public Assistance program was declared */,
  "hm_program_declared" INTEGER /* Indicator if Hazard Mitigation program was declared */,
  "ia_program_amount" TEXT /* Amount allocated for Individual Assistance */,
  "pa_program_amount" TEXT /* Amount allocated for Public Assistance */,
  "hm_program_amount" TEXT /* Amount allocated for Hazard Mitigation */,
  "ia_program_status" TEXT /* Current status of the Individual Assistance program */,
  "pa_program_status" TEXT /* Current status of the Public Assistance program */,
  "hm_program_status" TEXT /* Current status of the Hazard Mitigation program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assistance program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assistance program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_dates" (
  "disaster_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster declaration */,
  "incident_begin_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incident */,
  "incident_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incident */,
  "disaster_closeout_date" TEXT /* Date when the disaster recovery was closed out */,
  "recovery_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the recovery efforts */,
  "recovery_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the recovery efforts */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the recovery efforts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "designated_areas" (
  "disaster_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster declaration */,
  "fips_state_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the state */,
  "fips_county_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "place_code" INTEGER /* Place code for the designated area */,
  "designated_area" TEXT /* Name of the designated area affected */,
  "area_population" INTEGER /* Population of the designated area */,
  "area_damage_cost" TEXT /* Estimated damage cost in the designated area */,
  "area_recovery_status" TEXT /* Current recovery status of the designated area */,
  "area_response_agency" TEXT /* Agency responsible for the response in the designated area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_number", "fips_county_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashes" (
  "disaster_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster declaration */,
  "hash_value" TEXT /* Unique hash value representing the disaster record */,
  "hash_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate the hash (e.g., MD5, SHA-256) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the system or user who generated the hash */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the hash was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "refresh_logs" (
  "disaster_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster declaration */,
  "last_refresh" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last refresh of the disaster data */,
  "refreshed_by" TEXT /* Name of the system or user who initiated the refresh */,
  "refresh_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data refresh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "status" (
  "disaster_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster declaration */,
  "status_column" TEXT /* Current status of the disaster record */,
  "status_changed_by" TEXT /* Name of the system or user who changed the status */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last changed */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Federal Employee, State Agency, Local Government) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compliance check */,
  "disaster_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the disaster declaration */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check */,
  "check_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_disaster_number FOREIGN KEY ("disaster_number") REFERENCES disasters ("disaster_number")
)
